---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report an error, broken link, or outdated content in the guide
title: "[doc] "
labels: documentation
---

## What's wrong

Describe the issue. Include the chapter and section if you can.

## What it should say

If you have a suggested fix, share it here.

## Where you found it

URL or path to the file.

## Anything else

Context that might help. Salesforce release version, scratch org settings, what you were trying to do.
